params.version: The version that was attempting to be initialized

params.cdata: Complete calldata that was used during the initialization

params._river: The address of the River contract

InvalidInitialization(uint256,uint256).notice: An error occured during the initialization

Unauthorized(address).notice: The operator is unauthorized for the caller

Initialize(uint256,bytes).notice: Emitted when the contract is properly initialized

SetRiver(address).notice: Emitted when the linked River address is changed

getCredentials().notice: Retrieve the withdrawal credentials to use

pullEth(uint256).notice: Callable by River, sends the specified amount of ETH to River

version().notice: Retrieves the version of the contract

userdoc.notice: This contract is in charge of holding the exit and skimming funds and allow river to pull these funds
